news.t: 5 of the Best Preferred Stock ETFs for High and Stable Dividends

overview.description: The Global X SuperIncome Preferred ETF (SPFF) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Global X US High Yield Preferred index. The fund tracks a market value-weighted index of 50 of the highest-yielding US preferred securities. SPFF was launched on Jul 17, 2012 and is issued by Global X.
infoTable: Global X US High Yield Preferred Index

data.title: 5 of the Best Preferred Stock ETFs for High and Stable Dividends
data.text: The best preferred stock ETFs allow you to reduce your risk by investing in baskets of preferred stocks.
